summary: Runtime verification of (1) DM read receipts, (2) new 3-column dashboard layout, (3) admin toggle round-trip. Layout + toggle work perfectly. Read receipts have a real bug: sent-check icon renders but never flips to double-check when recipient reads the message, because the sender's 2s poller uses ?since=<last_created_at> which only returns NEW messages and never surfaces read-state updates on previously sent messages.

critical.issue: since filter uses {created_at: {$gt: since}} — returns only NEW messages. When recipient opens the thread and older messages get {read:true, read_at:...}, the sender's poller never re-fetches those older messages, so the double-check (msg-read) icon never appears on the sender side.

integration_issues.issue: MessagesView.jsx poller at lines 90-130 only appends new messages via ?since=lastSince and never refreshes read state of older sent messages. Result: msg-sent stays single-check forever after Balkin reads. Verified: after triggering Balkin's GET /api/messages/thread/<tf_id> (which does mark_read on backend), the sender UI still shows msg-sent count=5, msg-read count=0.

ADMIN_TOGGLE_ROUND_TRIP.after_first_toggle: Classic layout (toast: 'Reverted to classic dashboard layout.')

READ_RECEIPTS.sent_icon_on_new_message: PASS — Check icon rendered with class 'lucide lucide-check w-3 h-3 text-white/60' and data-testid='msg-sent'
READ_RECEIPTS.read_icon_after_recipient_reads: FAIL — msg-read count stays 0 even after Balkin GET /api/messages/thread/<tf_id> returned 200 (backend marked messages read). Frontend poller never picks up the read flip due to $gt filter.

rca_of_the_issue: Backend messaging.py line ~156: q['created_at'] = {'$gt': since}. Poller in frontend MessagesView.jsx line 105 sends ?since=lastSince on every 2s tick. So after the initial full-thread load, only strictly-newer messages come back — updates to the read/read_at fields of previously loaded messages are never seen by the sender. Fix options: (a) Backend: on ?since= requests, also return messages this user sent that got read_at > since (i.e., OR condition). (b) Frontend: additionally call GET /messages/thread/{id} without ?since every ~5s (or a lightweight /read-status endpoint) to refresh read state. Option (a) is cleaner and cheaper.
action_items: Fix backend /api/messages/thread/{other_id}?since=<ts> to also return read-state updates for messages this user sent that were read_at > since (e.g., use $or: [{created_at: {$gt: since}}, {from_id: user.id, read_at: {$gt: since}}]).
OR: In MessagesView.jsx poller, occasionally do a full re-fetch (no ?since) to refresh read receipts.
critical_code_review_comments: messaging.py GET /thread has a mixed responsibility: it both returns messages and mutates read state as a side effect. This is fine, but the ?since delta contract is incomplete — it only surfaces new inserts and hides all mutations (read flip). Consider returning a compact 'updates' array alongside 'messages' with {id, read, read_at} for records that changed since <ts>.

MessagesView.jsx poller stores lastSince from combined[combined.length - 1].created_at. If messages are ever returned out of order, this could skip messages. Consider Math.max over all created_at values.

success_rate.frontend: 2/3 flows fully PASS; 1/3 (read receipts) partially working — send icon OK, read flip missing

seed_data_creation: None (sent one DM 'read receipt test 1783252205' from testbugfix1 to Balkin)
context_for_next_testing_agent: New layout + admin toggle are 100% working. Read-receipt fix requires backend change to messaging.py GET /thread since-filter. Final DB state: use_new_home_layout=true (ON). Auth: POST /api/auth/login with {identifier,password,captcha_id,captcha_answer}. localStorage token key: bs_user_token. Layout selectors: [data-testid=new-home-layout], latest-orders-list, balance-hero, recent-dms-list. Admin: [data-testid=tab-settings], [data-testid=toggle-new-layout], [data-testid=layout-status]. Message icons: [data-testid=msg-sent] (Check), [data-testid=msg-read] (CheckCheck).
